title: Structures Addition
body:
![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/YCSMKFSR?logo=modrinth&label=Structure%20Addition)


Datapack adding some small structures. Other structures will arrive soon. This is my first time posting something about Minecraft. Other structures will arrive soon, I hope you like it! Do not hesitate to give me your feedback.

**Dolmen** this structure appears in:
- plains
- swamp
- taiga
- old_growth_pine_taiga
- old_growth_spruce_taiga
- jungle, sparse_jungle
- savanna
- savanna_plateau

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YCSMKFSR/images/0a0d74a2f9282d28e0c5e3c58a061793d1be1725.png)
